Brown Emo Chained Tie + White Cross Collar delivers sharp alt-core style with a bold contrast. Featuring a sleek brown tie accented with hanging chains and paired with a crisp white collar marked by a striking cross detail, this accessory blends emo, goth, and punk fashion into one fierce statement piece.
